name: Crafty Seal Ring Set
summary: This is a set of O-rings designed as replacements for the Crafty+ portable vaporiser by Storz & Bickel.
description: This is a set of O-rings designed as replacements for the Crafty+ portable vaporiser by Storz & Bickel. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
